headline: How Dividend Declaration And Truist Downgrade At Tronox (TROX) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In late April 2026, Tronox Holdings plc declared a quarterly dividend of US$0.0500 per share, payable on July 8, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the May 11 ex-dividend date. Around the same time, Truist cut its rating on Tronox to Sell, pointing to cost pressures and geographic mix risks that could weigh on near-term earnings and cash flows. Against this backdrop, we’ll examine how Truist’s downgrade, focused on cost and earnings risks, may alter Tronox’s investment narrative. We've...

headline: How The PROCEPT BioRobotics (PRCT) Investment Story Is Shifting After Q4 Miss And Guidance Reset
summary: PROCEPT BioRobotics’ model fair value sits at US$30.44 per share, with no change to the central price target despite refreshed assumptions. That steady target comes as analysts split between focusing on long term Aquablation adoption potential and near term execution risks following the Q4 miss and guidance reset. In the following sections, you will see how these updates fit into the broader analyst narrative and what to watch as views on the stock continue to evolve. Analyst Price Targets...
